title: Farmers Delight Kacchi
description: It is an addon for the famous mod "Farmer's Delight" which adds famous Bengali foods.
body:
# Farmer's Delight: Kacchi
It is an addon for the famous mod "Farmer's Delight" which adds many famous Bangladeshi/Bengali foods in minecraft. These foods not only give you some experience of bengali culture but also gives many useful effects to help your minecraft journey.

It uses farmer's delight for base functionality like cooking and many items used in recipes.

### List of some of the items in this mod:
1. Kacchi Biryani: A famous bengali mutton biryani which is famous all over Bangladesh. Made using Mutton and Rice and many other herbs and spices.
   ![Kacchi Biryani Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/494df34eeec0192a4526ab2b870ba28a9d6e5d1a.png)

2. Chicken Biryani: Another famous biryani recipe from Indian Subcontinent which is famous all around the world.
   ![Chicken Biryani Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e63f82841d04e56013ba69d9cc831c398b8c3f.png)

3. Mach Vaat/Rice with fish: Another classic bengali meal. It is known that "মাছে ভাতে বাঙালি" (Bengali is made of Fish and Rice.)
   ![Mach Vaat Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463edbf930d4e74c105685de3f2def6e3b06c11f.png)
   
4. Panta Vaat: It is also a well-known bengali food, originating hundreds of years ago in farming based bengal and a part of famous bengali holiday Pohela Boishakh(1st of Boishakh).
   ![Panta Vaat Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e29930d9dc17de61be1e6020e12ef07dc4e65be4.png)
   
5. Doi/Yogurt: A famous after meal dessert made with milk.
   ![Doi Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115eca71578c680a124a183e58735edcad3a98e7.png)

They are all crafted using vanilla, farmers delight and a few custom items.
